domains.name: Analytics Warehouse
domains.description: Sales facts and conformed product/date dimensions from the analytics warehouse, exposed over SQL. Answers questions about revenue and unit sales by product, category, and time period. SQL is the canonical deterministic-aggregation backend: sums, averages, and counts are computed by the database via aggregate functions and GROUP BY. Revenue amounts are in USD.
example_questions: What was total revenue by product category last quarter?
Which products had the highest unit sales this year?
What is the average sale amount by month for electronics?
